Episteme 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT
  1. org.episteme.social.linguistics
  2. Language

Uses of Class
org.episteme.social.linguistics.Language

Packages that use Language
Package
Description
org.episteme.social.linguistics
Provides mathematical and computational models for natural language processing, linguistic analysis, and glottochronology.
org.episteme.social.linguistics.loaders
User interface components and internationalization support for Episteme applications.
org.episteme.social.linguistics.loaders.tigerxml
Standard TigerXML loader for linguistic corpora.
org.episteme.social.sociology
- social structures, persons, and cultural modeling.

    Constructor
    Description

    Creates a grammar for a language.

    Creates a named grammar.

    Creates a new Grapheme.
     
    Lexeme(String canonicalForm, Language language)
    Constructs a lexeme with a canonical form.
     
    Lexicon(String name, Language language)
    Creates a lexicon for a specific language.
     
    Morpheme(Language language, String text)
    Constructs a morpheme from a raw string.
     
    Morpheme(Language language, List<Grapheme> graphemes, List<Phoneme> phonemes)
    Constructs a morpheme from explicit phonetic and orthographic units.
    protected
    NaturalLanguageAnalyzer(Language language)
     
     
    Phoneme(Language language, String ipaSymbol, Phoneme.Type type)
    Creates a phoneme with IPA symbol (for multi-character IPA).
     
    Phoneme(Language language, Clip clip)
    Creates a phoneme with an audio clip.
     
    Phoneme(Language language, Clip clip, char ipaCharacter)
    Creates a phoneme with audio and IPA representation.
     
    Phrase(String text, Language language)
    Initializes a phrase by parsing a raw text string.
     
    Text(String rawText, Language language)
    Creates a text with a specified language.
     
    Translation(Text text, Language target)
    Creates a new Translation object.
     
    Word(Language language, String text)
    Creates a simple word consisting of a single morpheme.
